'''SK-Z38''' was a [[Bird Droid]] found at the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency.<ref name="ST" /> Two of them were befriended by Star Tours droid [[G2-4T]] a few months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. They usually were located on the droid lifts and other high places, so they could make their nests. They were also capable of laying eggs, something 4T was unaware of, although their chances of the eggs hatching were smaller than [[RX-24/Legends|RX-24]] making his first flight without problems.<ref name="CGSW" />

==Behind the scenes==
SK-Z38 was originally one of the [[Wikipedia:Audio-Animatronics|animatronic]] birds found in [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney's]] [[Wikipedia:Splash Mountain|Splash Mountain]] attraction. Its skin was removed, and the droid was retooled for use in [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']].<ref name="Collection III">{{SWArchive|url=collecting/news/hasbro/news20030325.html|text=''Star Tours'' Collection III}}</ref>

The droid appeared in both the [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]] and [[Tokyo Disneyland]] versions of the ride, the latter supplying its full information on the Spot the Droid poster<ref name="EE">{{EndorExpress|url=star-wars-adventures/star-tours/2013/05/retro-tokyo-a-look-back-at-tdls-star-tours-before-it-was-updated|text=Retro-Tokyo! A look back at TDL's Star Tours before it was updated…}}</ref> and the ''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]''.<ref name="CGSW" /> In [[2003]], [[Hasbro]] released SK-Z38 as an exclusive ''Star Tours'' action figure.<ref name="Toy">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Star Tours (toy line)|pack=SK-Z38|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/sw03stskz38.asp}}</ref>
